title: THESE Visited Us Before UFOs (Mystery Airships)
summary: Jesse Michels discusses the historical phenomenon of 'mystery airships' - sightings from the late 1800s featuring humanoid pilots who would descend from aerial craft and interact with witnesses, representing a precursor to modern UFO/alien visitation accounts.

key_claims.claim: Before modern UFO encounters like Betty and Barney Hill, there were sightings of 'airships' piloted by humanoid beings who would land and have conversations with people
The airship pilots would sometimes descend on ladders to farms and converse with witnesses before flying away
These historical visitation events sometimes left people transformed for the better rather than traumatized
